name: Pre-existing back issues flared from heavy lifting at work. Allen Rule apply?
description: Yes, show unusual exertion aggravated it.[3]

mainEntity.name: Pre-existing back issues flared from heavy lifting at work. Allen Rule apply?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, show unusual exertion aggravated it.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes if pre-existing contributed; prove unusual exertion beyond daily life.[3] Key factors: (1) Contributes to injury; (2) Extraordinary work effort; (3) Medical cause link.[3] Document duties vs. normal life; doctor opinion.[3] Meets higher bar.
